title: Trends Aggregator Input
description: Select sources and configure options for multi-platform trending topic aggregation.

sources.title: Sources to Fetch
sources.description: Select which platforms to aggregate trends from. Leave empty to fetch all sources.

googleGeo.title: Google Trends Country
googleGeo.description: Two-letter country code for Google Daily Search Trends. Examples: 'US', 'JP', 'GB', 'DE', 'FR', 'BR', 'IN'.

limit.title: Results Per Source
limit.description: Maximum number of trending items to fetch per source (1-50).
